SEARCH
Package project2_root.database

Interface POSDatabase

All Known Implementing Classes:
SQLServerPOSDatabase
public interface POSDatabase

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addEmployee(String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
    Adds a new employee to the system.
    int
    addIngredient(String name, double addCost)
    Adds a new ingredient to the system and returns its generated ID.
    void
    addItemToOrder(int orderId, OrderItem item)
    Adds a new item to a specific order.
    void
    addMenuItem(String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
    Adds a completely new item to the menu.
    boolean
    canGenerateZReport()
    Checks if a Z-report (end-of-day financial and inventory summary) can be generated now.
    void
    completeOrder(int orderId)
    Adds OrderItems attached to the orderID to the database itself.
    void
    confirmOrder(int orderId)
    Confirms a restock order as received and stocked.
    int
    createOrder(int employeeId)
    Creates a new order associated with an employee.
    void
    decrementIngredientsForItem(OrderItem item)
    Decrements inventory stock for each ingredient in an order item.
    ZReportSummary
    finalizeCurrentZReport()
    Generates and finalizes the Z-report for the current period.
    Collection<Ingredient>
    getAllIngredients()
    Retrieves all known ingredients ever entered in the system.
    Collection<Ingredient>
    getCriticalIngredients(int weeksToCover)
    Identifies all ingredients that are considered critical given sales projections.
    Collection<Employee>
    getEmployees()
    Retrieves all employees (active and/or inactive).
    List<HourlySalesRow>
    getHourlySalesToday()
    Returns an hour-by-hour breakdown of today’s sales totals (useful for trend visualizations).
    List<ItemIngredient>
    getIngredientsForMenuItem(int itemId)
    Lists all ingredients (and the quantities needed) for a menu item.
    List<IngredientStock>
    getIngredientStock()
    Gets a list of current ingredient stock levels.
    Collection<IngredientUsageRow>
    getIngredientUsage(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)
    Returns a record of how much of each ingredient was used in orders between two dates.
    MenuItem
    getMenuItemById(int itemId)
    Retrieves a menu item by its unique identifier.
    Collection<MenuItem>
    getMenuItems()
    Retrieves all orderable items currently stored on the menu.
    int
    getOrderCountToday()
    Gets the number of orders completed so far today.
    Collection<OrderItem>
    getOrderItems(int orderId)
    Fetches all items currently associated with a given order.
    Collection<RestockOrder>
    getRestockOrders()
    Retrieves all outstanding or completed restock orders.
    List<TimeBucketSales>
    getSalesBetween(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, boolean weekly)
    Queries the historical or current sales between two dates, optionally aggregated weekly.
    List<ItemSalesRow>
    getSalesByItemBetween(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Retrieves a time-bucketed breakdown (daily/weekly/...) of sales for each menu item between two dates.
    List<ItemSalesRow>
    getSalesByItemToday()
    Returns a breakdown of sales for each menu item for the current day.
    double
    getTotalSalesToday()
    Gets the total sales in currency made today.
    List<ZReportSummary>
    getZReportHistory()
    Retrieves historical Z-reports previously finalized for auditing or performance review.
    void
    removeOrderItem(int orderItemId)
    Removes an order item by its line-item ID.
    void
    saveEmployee(int employeeId, String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
    Updates basic details on an employee, such as names or manager status.
    void
    saveMenuItem(int id, String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
    Updates an existing menu item with new properties and ingredients.
    void
    submitRestockOrder(Map<Integer,Integer> ingredientQuantities)
    Submits a new restock order specifying exact quantities for each ingredient requested.
    Optional<Employee>
    validateLogin(int employeeId, String password)
    Attempts to validate an employee login using provided credentials.

  • Method Details

    • validateLogin

      Optional<Employee> validateLogin(int employeeId, String password)
      Attempts to validate an employee login using provided credentials.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - The unique employee ID number.
      password - The employee's password.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the Employee if login succeeded, or an empty Optional if credentials are invalid.

    • getMenuItems

      Collection<MenuItem> getMenuItems()
      Retrieves all orderable items currently stored on the menu.
      Returns:
      A Collection of MenuItem objects representing the current menu. If the query fails, the collection will be empty.

    • getIngredientStock

      List<IngredientStock> getIngredientStock()
      Gets a list of current ingredient stock levels.
      Returns:
      A List of IngredientStock, each detailing an ingredient and its current quantity in stock.

    • createOrder

      int createOrder(int employeeId)
      Creates a new order associated with an employee.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - The ID of the employee creating the order.
      Returns:
      The unique order ID of the newly created order.

    • addItemToOrder

      void addItemToOrder(int orderId, OrderItem item)
      Adds a new item to a specific order. Modifies the state of the order to include the provided item.
      Parameters:
      orderId - The ID of the order receiving the item.
      item - An OrderItem describing the menu item and any customization.

    • getOrderItems

      Collection<OrderItem> getOrderItems(int orderId)
      Fetches all items currently associated with a given order.
      Parameters:
      orderId - The ID of the target order.
      Returns:
      A Collection of OrderItem objects for the given order.

    • removeOrderItem

      void removeOrderItem(int orderItemId)
      Removes an order item by its line-item ID. If the item does not exist, this is a no-op.
      Parameters:
      orderItemId - The unique ID for the item within the order to be removed.

    • completeOrder

      void completeOrder(int orderId)
      Adds OrderItems attached to the orderID to the database itself.
      Parameters:
      orderId - The ID of the order to complete.

    • getRestockOrders

      Collection<RestockOrder> getRestockOrders()
      Retrieves all outstanding or completed restock orders.
      Returns:
      A Collection of RestockOrder objects.

    • getCriticalIngredients

      Collection<Ingredient> getCriticalIngredients(int weeksToCover)
      Identifies all ingredients that are considered critical given sales projections. Typically, this means stocks will run out within `weeksToCover` weeks.
      Parameters:
      weeksToCover - The number of upcoming weeks of sales projections to check.
      Returns:
      A Collection of Ingredients that require urgent restocking.

    • getSalesBetween

      List<TimeBucketSales> getSalesBetween(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, boolean weekly)
      Queries the historical or current sales between two dates, optionally aggregated weekly.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The beginning date (inclusive) for the sales search.
      endDate - The ending date (inclusive) for the sales search.
      weekly - If true, aggregates totals by week; otherwise, daily.
      Returns:
      A List of TimeBucketSales entries covering the specified range.

    • getAllIngredients

      Collection<Ingredient> getAllIngredients()
      Retrieves all known ingredients ever entered in the system.
      Returns:
      A Collection of all Ingredient objects.

    • submitRestockOrder

      void submitRestockOrder(Map<Integer,Integer> ingredientQuantities)
      Submits a new restock order specifying exact quantities for each ingredient requested.
      Parameters:
      ingredientQuantities - Map of ingredient IDs to integer quantities requested.

    • confirmOrder

      void confirmOrder(int orderId)
      Confirms a restock order as received and stocked.
      Parameters:
      orderId - The restock order ID to confirm.

    • saveMenuItem

      void saveMenuItem(int id, String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Updates an existing menu item with new properties and ingredients.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique ID of the menu item to update.
      name - New or updated name for the item.
      cost - New or updated cost/price for the item.
      ingredients - Map of ingredient IDs to the quantities required for the menu item.

    • addMenuItem

      void addMenuItem(String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Adds a completely new item to the menu.
      Parameters:
      name - Name of the new menu item.
      cost - Sale price of the new item.
      ingredients - Map of ingredient IDs to quantities used in this item.

    • getEmployees

      Collection<Employee> getEmployees()
      Retrieves all employees (active and/or inactive).
      Returns:
      A Collection of Employee records.

    • saveEmployee

      void saveEmployee(int employeeId, String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
      Updates basic details on an employee, such as names or manager status.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - The employee's unique ID.
      firstName - Given name.
      lastName - Family name.
      isManager - True if this employee is a manager/has admin privileges.

    • addEmployee

      void addEmployee(String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
      Adds a new employee to the system.
      Parameters:
      firstName - Given name.
      lastName - Family name.
      isManager - True if this employee is a manager/has admin privileges.

    • getMenuItemById

      MenuItem getMenuItemById(int itemId)
      Retrieves a menu item by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      itemId - The menu item's unique ID.
      Returns:
      The corresponding MenuItem, or null if not found.

    • decrementIngredientsForItem

      void decrementIngredientsForItem(OrderItem item)
      Decrements inventory stock for each ingredient in an order item. Should only be called when the order is finalized.
      Parameters:
      item - The OrderItem whose ingredients are to be decremented.

    • addIngredient

      int addIngredient(String name, double addCost)
      Adds a new ingredient to the system and returns its generated ID.
      Parameters:
      name - The full name of the ingredient.
      addCost - The cost of one unit of the new ingredient.
      Returns:
      The unique ID of the newly created ingredient.

    • getOrderCountToday

      int getOrderCountToday()
      Gets the number of orders completed so far today.
      Returns:
      Integer count of today's orders.

    • getTotalSalesToday

      double getTotalSalesToday()
      Gets the total sales in currency made today.
      Returns:
      The sum of all sales (in dollars, etc.) for the current day.

    • getSalesByItemBetween

      List<ItemSalesRow> getSalesByItemBetween(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Retrieves a time-bucketed breakdown (daily/weekly/...) of sales for each menu item between two dates.
      Parameters:
      startDate - Start date (inclusive).
      endDate - End date (inclusive).
      Returns:
      A list of ItemSalesRow capturing per-item sales.

    • getHourlySalesToday

      List<HourlySalesRow> getHourlySalesToday()
      Returns an hour-by-hour breakdown of today’s sales totals (useful for trend visualizations).
      Returns:
      List of HourlySalesRow representing sales per hour.

    • getSalesByItemToday

      List<ItemSalesRow> getSalesByItemToday()
      Returns a breakdown of sales for each menu item for the current day.
      Returns:
      List of ItemSalesRow with today’s per-item sales totals.

    • getIngredientsForMenuItem

      List<ItemIngredient> getIngredientsForMenuItem(int itemId)
      Lists all ingredients (and the quantities needed) for a menu item.
      Parameters:
      itemId - The menu item ID.
      Returns:
      List of ItemIngredient pairs for this menu item.

    • getIngredientUsage

      Collection<IngredientUsageRow> getIngredientUsage(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)
      Returns a record of how much of each ingredient was used in orders between two dates.
      Parameters:
      start - Start date (inclusive).
      end - End date (inclusive).
      Returns:
      Collection of IngredientUsageRow, including ingredient, quantity, and time frame.

    • canGenerateZReport

      boolean canGenerateZReport()
      Checks if a Z-report (end-of-day financial and inventory summary) can be generated now.
      Returns:
      true if all requirements to generate the Z-report are met; false otherwise.

    • finalizeCurrentZReport

      ZReportSummary finalizeCurrentZReport()
      Generates and finalizes the Z-report for the current period. This locks the reporting period and returns a summary of sales and inventory changes.
      Returns:
      ZReportSummary object with key performance numbers, totals, and summaries.

    • getZReportHistory

      List<ZReportSummary> getZReportHistory()
      Retrieves historical Z-reports previously finalized for auditing or performance review.
      Returns:
      A list of ZReportSummary objects describing each previous report.
